subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of Bahá! Regarding the lessons [Some Answered Questions], rest assured that in these days I shall, by whatever means possible, undertake their correction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه البهاء در خصوص درسها مطمئن باش این ایام هر قسم است بتصحیح آنها پردازم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @thankfulness; gratitude
